SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut.backbone

Interface IBackboneScheduler

All Known Implementing Classes:
EmbeddedScheduler
public interface IBackboneScheduler
The IBackboneScheduler interface provides a method for scheduling tasks. This is typically used in systems that need to execute tasks at specific intervals.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    schedule(String queue, boolean shared, String atiBroadcastTopicKey, TaskInitRequest startRequest, long interval, TimeUnit timeUnit)
    Schedules a task to be executed at a fixed interval.
    void
    shutdown()
     

  • Method Details

    • schedule

      void schedule(String queue, boolean shared, String atiBroadcastTopicKey, TaskInitRequest startRequest, long interval, TimeUnit timeUnit)
      Schedules a task to be executed at a fixed interval.
      Parameters:
      queue - the queue in which the task will be placed
      shared - a boolean indicating whether the task is shared
      atiBroadcastTopicKey - the key of the topic to which the task's completion will be broadcasted
      startRequest - the initial request that starts the task
      interval - the interval at which the task will be executed
      timeUnit - the unit of time for the interval

    • shutdown

      void shutdown()
